nodes.name: 萨尔瓦多
nodes.summary: 萨尔瓦多是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联86种鸟类，包括山冠雉、White-bellied chachalaca、Spot-bellied bobwhite等86种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 危地马拉

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Pacific Coast of Mexico

nodes.name: 桂红蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 桂红蜂鸟（Cinnamon hummingbird，学名 Amazilia rutila），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联15个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Cinnamon hummingbirds are typically found at or just slightly above sea level, often inhabiting coastal and lowland areas, as well as further inland in warmer locations in the southern parts of their range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They are predominantly found along the Pacific western coast of México and south through Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, Nicaragua and Costa Rica. They are also found in Belize and the southern Mexican states of Campeche, Quintana Roo and Yucatán

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cinnamon hummingbird is resident throughout its range. The subspecies of cinnamon hummingbird are found in the following regions: * Amazilia rutila diluta — NW Mexican states of Sinaloa and Nayarit

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: corallirostris. The cinnamon hummingbird inhabits primary and secondary deciduous and semi-deciduous forests and thorn forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It has a large range and its population is estimated to be at least 500,000 mature individuals and stable. Localized habitat destruction appears to be its only threat
